title: NyannConfig
description: ~/.claude/nyann/config.json — per-user nyann settings (team profile sources, etc.)

name.description: Short identifier; used as the cache namespace (<name>/<profile-name>).

last_synced_at.description: Unix timestamp of last successful sync.

pin_strategy.$comment: v1.11.0 — branch (default): fetch+reset to HEAD. tag: checkout specific tag. sha: checkout specific commit.
pin_strategy.description: How to pin this source. 'branch' follows HEAD; 'tag' and 'sha' are immutable until explicitly updated.

pin.$comment: v1.11.0 — the SHA to pin to when pin_strategy is 'sha'. Ignored for 'branch' and 'tag' (which use 'ref').
pin.description: Commit SHA to pin to (only used when pin_strategy is 'sha').
